summary: Executed backend API regression tests and frontend end-to-end validation on the public preview URL. Backend CRUD passed; most builder UI flows passed, but drag-and-drop add and section reorder via drag remain failing in repeated runs.

ui_bugs.issue: Dragging a library section handle onto the canvas does not add a section (count unchanged across 3 attempts).
Drag reorder did not reliably move section order in automated interaction; behavior appears non-functional or unstable under pointer drag.

integration_issues.issue: Drag operations fail while click-to-add works, indicating DnD path issue rather than general section creation.

action_items: Fix/verify drag-and-drop from library into canvas in real user interaction and automation.
Fix/verify sortable section reorder interaction with dnd-kit pointer events and drop target handling.
Run manual + automated retest specifically for DnD flows after fix.
critical_code_review_comments: BuilderProjectCreate/Update models accept unconstrained strings; consider adding min_length and stronger validation for required fields.
DnD logic likely impacted by interaction layer (pointer/scroll/drop target), since click-to-add and save persistence are healthy.
seed_data_creation: Backend test data with TEST_Builder_* prefixes created; current test file now cleans up created projects per test. Some legacy TEST_ cards from earlier run may still exist.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified passes: dashboard load/create/open, project delete, starter pages, click-to-add, duplicate/delete section, page create/switch/delete, properties content/style edits, save+reload persistence, viewport/focus mode. Repeated failures remain only on drag-based add/reorder.
rca of the issue: Repro: Create/open project -> Library tab -> drag library handle to canvas dropzone, section count unchanged; drag section handle to reorder, order not reliably updated. Likely root cause is dnd-kit pointer/drop interaction (sensor activation/over target resolution within ScrollArea/canvas), not API persistence, because click-to-add and save/update endpoints work. Mitigation: instrument onDragStart/onDragEnd payloads (active/over IDs), verify over.id resolves to canvas-dropzone/section IDs, and validate pointer events/drag handle layering in sidebar + canvas containers.
